text: The atmosphere at THE HQ LA is unlike anything else in the city. Knowledgeable staff and an unmatched selection.
I've been coming here since they opened. The quality is consistently top-tier and the team genuinely cares.
Best in LA, hands down. The members-only feel makes every visit special. Worth every penny.
THE HQ is where I send everyone I know. The curation is impeccable and the vibe is always on point.
Best flower and genetics in LA. The team here are superstars.
Incredible selection and very welcoming staff. If you haven't been, you're seriously missing out on the HQ experience.
This place sets the standard. Clean, professional, exclusive. Everything you want from a premium LA destination.
